\"\"\"Test CSS selectors work correctly when stuck and failed cards are mixed.\"\"\"\n\n    def test_selector_distinguishes_stuck_from_failed(self):\n        \"\"\"Selectors correctly distinguish stuck cards from failed cards.\"\"\"\n        from tests.e2e.canvas_render import render_builtin_cards, node_available\n\n        if not node_available():\n            pytest.skip(\"node not PATH\")\n\n        # Mix stuck and failed cards\n        stuck_cards = [\n            _stuck_card_data(bead_id=\"adc-stuck-mix-1\", stuck_reason=\"Stuck 1\"),\n            _stuck_card_data(bead_id=\"adc-stuck-mix-2\", stuck_reason=\"Stuck 2\"),\n        ]\n\n        failed_cards = [\n            _failed_card_data(bead_id=\"adc-failed-mix-1\", failure_reason=\"Failed 1\"),\n            _failed_card_data(bead_id=\"adc-failed-mix-2\", failure_reason=\"Failed 2\"),\n        ]\n\n        stuck_outs = render_builtin_cards(\"stuck\", stuck_cards)\n        failed_outs = render_builtin_cards(\"failed\", failed_cards)\n\n        # [data-builtin=\"stuck\"] should only match stuck cards\n        for out in stuck_outs:\n            node = parse_card_html(out)\n            assert node.attrs.get(\"data-builtin\") == \"stuck\"\n            assert node.has_class(\"stuck-card\")\n            assert not node.has_class(\"failed-card\")\n\n        # [data-builtin=\"failed\"] should only match failed cards\n        for out in failed_outs:\n            node = parse_card_html(out)\n            assert node.attrs.get(\"data-builtin\") == \"failed\"\n            assert node.has_class(\"failed-card\")\n            assert not node.has_class(\"stuck-card\")\n\n    def test_selector_finds_specific_card_in_mixed_set(self):\n        \"\"\"Can select a specific card by bead_id even when other cards are present.\"\"\"\n        from tests.e2e.canvas_render import render_builtin_cards, node_available\n\n        if not node_available():\n            pytest.skip(\"node not on PATH\")\n\n        target_bead_id = \"adc-target-mixed\"\n        cards = [\n            _stuck_card_data(bead_id=\"adc-stuck-a\", stuck_reason=\"Stuck A\"),\n            _failed_card_data(bead_id=target_bead_id, failure_reason=\"Target\"),\n            _stuck_card_data(bead_id=\"adc-stuck-b\", stuck_reason=\"Stuck B\"),\n        ]\n\n        # Render stuck cards first, then failed\n        stuck_outs = render_builtin_cards(\"stuck\", cards[:1] + [cards[2]])\n        failed_outs = render_builtin_cards(\"failed\", [cards[1]])\n\n        # Find target in failed cards\n        target_found = False\n        for out in failed_outs:\n            if out.get(\"dataset\", {}).get(\"beadId\") == target_bead_id:\n                target_found = True\n                node = parse_card_html(out)\n                # Selector: [data-builtin=\"failed\"][data-bead-id=\"adc-target-mixed\"]\n                assert node.attrs.get(\"data-builtin\") == \"failed\"\n                assert node.attrs.get(\"data-bead-id\") == target_bead_id\n\n        assert target_found, \"Target card should be found\"\n\n\n# === Persistence Tests ==========================================================\n\n\n@pytest.mark.asyncio\nclass TestDismissalPersistenceStuckCards:\n    \"\"\"Test dismissed stuck cards don't reappear on topic reload.\"\"\"\n\n    async def test_dismissed_stuck_card_not_recreated_on_topic_reload(self, tmp_path):\n        \"\"\"Once a stuck card is dismissed, it doesn't reappear when topics are reloaded.\"\"\"\n        from src.session.store import SessionStore\n\n        db_path = tmp_path / \"test_stuck_persistence.db\"\n        store = SessionStore(db_path)\n        await store.initialize()\n\n        try:\n            session_id = await store.create_session()\n\n            utterance_id = await store.create_utterance(\n                session_id=session_id,\n                raw_text=\"Test stuck persistence\",\n            )\n\n            topic_id, _ = await store.find_or_create_topic(\n                label=\"Stuck Persistence Test\",\n                session_id=session_id,\n                topic_type=\"project\",\n            )\n\n            bead_ref = \"adc-stuck-persist-test\"\n            intent_id = await store.create_intent(\n                utterance_id=utterance_id,\n                session_id=session_id,\n                project_slug=\"adc\",\n                intent_type=\"task-profile\",\n                bead_ref=bead_ref,\n                topic_id=topic_id,\n            )\n\n            # Create stuck result\n            result_id = await store.create_result(\n                intent_id=intent_id,\n                topic_id=topic_id,\n                session_id=session_id,\n                summary=\"Task stuck — needs your input\",\n                data={\n                    \"bead_id\": bead_ref,\n                    \"stuck_reason\": \"Persistence test\",\n                    \"refusal_count\": 1,\n                    \"message\": \"Stuck for testing\",\n                },\n                urgency=\"high\",\n            )\n\n            # First \"page load\" - verify card appears\n            import json\n            results_before = await store.get_results_for_intent(intent_id)\n            assert len(results_before) == 1, \"Card should appear on first load\"\n            result_data_before = json.loads(results_before[0][\"data\"])\n            assert result_data_before[\"bead_id\"] == bead_ref\n\n            # User dismisses the card\n            deletion_result = await store.delete_result(result_id, session_id)\n            assert deletion_result[\"result_deleted\"] == 1\n\n            # Simulate \"page reload\" - query topics again\n            results_after = await store.get_results_for_intent(intent_id)\n            assert len(results_after) == 0, \"Dismissed card should not reappear on reload\"\n\n            # Also verify via topics query (simulating canvas reload)\n            topics = await store.get_active_topics(session_id)\n            topic = next((t for t in topics if t[\"id\"] == topic_id), None)\n            assert topic is not None, \"Topic should still exist\"\n\n        finally:\n            await store.close()\n\n    async def test_dismissed_stuck_card_persists_across_session_reopen(self, tmp_path):\n        \"\"\"Dismissed stuck card stays dismissed even after closing and reopening the session store.\"\"\"\n        from src.session.store import SessionStore\n\n        db_path = tmp_path / \"test_stuck_session_reopen.db\"\n\n        # First session: create and dismiss\n        store1 = SessionStore(db_path)\n        await store1.initialize()\n\n        session_id = await store1.create_session()\n        utterance_id = await store1.create_utterance(\n            session_id=session_id,\n            raw_text=\"Test session reopen\",\n        )\n\n        topic_id, _ = await store1.find_or_create_topic(\n            label=\"Session Reopen Test\",\n            session_id=session_id,\n            topic_type=\"project\",\n        )\n\n        bead_ref = \"adc-stuck-session-test\"\n        intent_id = await store1.create_intent(\n            utterance_id=utterance_id,\n            session_id=session_id,\n            project_slug=\"adc\",\n            intent_type=\"task-profile\",\n            bead_ref=bead_ref,\n            topic_id=topic_id,\n        )\n\n        result_id = await store1.create_result(\n            intent_id=intent_id,\n            topic_id=topic_id,\n            session_id=session_id,\n            summary=\"Task stuck\",\n            data={\"bead_id\": bead_ref, \"stuck_reason\": \"Session test\"},\n            urgency=\"high\",\n        )\n\n        # Verify result exists\n        results_before = await store1.get_results_for_intent(intent_id)\n        assert len(results_before) == 1\n\n        # Dismiss the card\n        await store1.delete_result(result_id, session_id)\n        await store1.close()\n\n        # Second session: reopen and verify card is still dismissed\n        store2 = SessionStore(db_path)\n        await store2.initialize()\n\n        try:\n            results_after = await store2.get_results_for_intent(intent_id)\n            assert len(results_after) == 0, \"Dismissed card should stay dismissed after session reopen\"\n\n        finally:\n            await store2.close()\n\n\n@pytest.mark.asyncio\nclass \"\"\"Test selective dismissal of multiple cards.\"\"\"\n\n    async def test_multiple_stuck_cards_selective_dismissal(self, tmp_path):\n        \"\"\"Dismissing one stuck card doesn't affect other stuck cards.\"\"\"\n        from src.session.store import SessionStore\n\n        db_path = tmp_path / \"test_multiple_stuck.db\"\n        store = SessionStore(db_path)\n        await store.initialize()\n\n        try:\n            session_id = await store.create_session()\n            topic_id, _ = await store.find_or_create_topic(\n                label=\"Multi Stuck Test\",\n                session_id=session_id,\n                topic_type=\"project\",\n            )\n\n            # Create three stuck cards\n            cards = []\n            for i in range(1, 4):\n                utterance_id = await store.create_utterance(\n                    session_id=session_id,\n                    raw_text=f\"Test stuck {i}\",\n                )\n\n                bead_ref = f\"adc-stuck-{i}\"\n                intent_id = await store.create_intent(\n                    utterance_id=utterance_id,\n                    session_id=session_id,\n                    project_slug=\"adc\",\n                    intent_type=\"task-profile\",\n                    bead_ref=bead_ref,\n                    topic_id=topic_id,\n                )\n\n                result_id = await store.create_result(\n                    intent_id=intent_id,\n                    topic_id=topic_id,\n                    session_id=session_id,\n                    summary=f\"Stuck card {i}\",\n                    data={\"bead_id\": bead_ref, \"stuck_reason\": f\"Reason {i}\"},\n                    urgency=\"high\",\n                )\n                cards.append({\"bead_ref\": bead_ref, \"intent_id\": intent_id, \"result_id\": result_id})\n\n            # Verify all three cards exist\n            for card in cards:\n                results = await store.get_results_for_intent(card[\"intent_id\"])\n                assert len(results) == 1\n\n            # Dismiss the second card only\n            await store.delete_result(cards[1][\"result_id\"], session_id)\n\n            # Verify card 2 is gone, but cards 1 and 3 remain\n            results_1 = await store.get_results_for_intent(cards[0][\"intent_id\"])\n            results_2 = await store.get_results_for_intent(cards[1][\"intent_id\"])\n            results_3 = await store.get_results_for_intent(cards[2][\"intent_id\"])\n\n            assert len(results_1) == 1, \"Card 1 should still exist\"\n            assert len(results_2) == 0, \"Card 2 should be dismissed\"\n            assert len(results_3) == 1, \"Card 3 should still exist\"\n\n        finally:\n            await store.close()\n\n    async def test_multiple_failed_cards_selective_dismissal(self, tmp_path):\n        \"\"\"Dismissing one failed card doesn't affect other failed cards.\"\"\"\n        from src.session.store import SessionStore\n\n        db_path = tmp_path / \"test_multiple_failed.db\"\n        store = SessionStore(db_path)\n        await store.initialize()\n\n        try:\n            session_id = await store.create_session()\n            topic_id, _ = three failed cards\n            cards = []\n            for i in range(1, 4):\n                utterance_id = await store.create_utterance(\n                    session_id=session_id,\n                    raw_text=f\"Test failed {i}\",\n                )\n\n                bead_ref = f\"adc-failed-{i}\"\n                intent_id = await store.create_intent(\n topic_id=topic_id,\n                    session_id=session_id,\n                    summary=f\"Task Failed {i}\",\n                    data={\n                        \"bead_ref\": bead_ref,\n                        \"failure_reason\": f\"Failure {i}\",\n                        \"error_type\": \"test_error\",\n                    },\n                    urgency=\"high\",\n                )\n                cards.append({\"bead_ref\": bead_ref, \"intent_id\": intent_id, \"result_id\": result_id})\n\n            # Verify all three cards exist\n            for card in cards:\n store.delete_result(cards[0][\"result_id\"], session_id)\n            await store.delete_result(cards[2][\"result_id\"], session_id)\n\n            # Verify cards 1 and 3 are gone, but card 2 remains\n            results_1 = await store.get_results_for_intent(cards[0][\"intent_id\"])\n            results_2 = await store.get_results_for_intent(cards[1][\"intent_id\"])\n            results_3 = await store.get_results_for_intent(cards[2][\"intent_id\"])\n\n            assert len(results_1) == 0, \"Card 1 should be dismissed\"\n            assert len(results_2) == 1, \"Card 2 should still exist\"\n            assert len(results_3) == 0, \"Card 3 should be dismissed\"\n\n        finally:\n            await store.close()\n\n    async def store.delete_result(cards[1][\"result_id\"], session_id)  # failed card\n            await store.delete_result(cards[2][\"result_id\"], session_id)  # stuck card 2\n\n            # Verify selective dismissal worked\n            results_1 = await store.get_results_for_intent(cards[0][\"intent_id\"])\n            results_2 = await store.get_results_for_intent(cards[1][\"intent_id\"])\n            results_3 = await store.get_results_for_intent(cards[2][\"intent_id\"])\n\n            assert len(results_1) == 1, \"Stuck card 1 should still exist\"\n            assert len(results_2) == 0, \"Failed card should be dismissed\"\n            assert len(results_3) == 0, \"Stuck card 2 should be dismissed\"\n\n        finally:\n            await store.close()\n\n\n# === End-to-End Persistence Tests ===============================================\n\n\n@pytest.mark.asyncio\nclass TestEndToEndDismissalPersistence:\n    \"\"\"Comprehensive end-to-end tests for dismissal persistence.\"\"\"\n\n    async def test_complete_dismissal_flow_with_topic_reload(self, tmp_path):\n        \"\"\"Test complete flow: create card → dismiss → reload topics → verify gone.\"\"\"\n        from src.session.store import SessionStore\n\n        db_path = tmp_path / \"test_e2e_flow.db\"\n        store = SessionStore(db_path)\n        await store.initialize()\n\n        try:\n            session_id = await store.create_session()\n\n            # Create utterance\n            utterance_id = await store.create_utterance(\n                session_id=session_id,\n                raw_text=\"Deploy to production\",\n            )\n\n            # Create topic\n            topic_id, _ = await store.find_or_create_topic(\n                label=\"Production Deployment\",\n                session_id=session_id,\n                topic_type=\"project\",\n            )\n\n            # Create intent with stuck scenario\n            bead_ref = \"adc-deploy-stuck\"\n            intent_id = await store.create_intent(\n                utterance_id=utterance_id,\n                session_id=session_id,\n                project_slug=\"adc\",\n                intent_type=\"task-profile\",\n                bead_ref=bead_ref,\n                topic_id=topic_id,\n            )\n\n            # Create stuck result\n            result_id = await store.create_result(\n                intent_id=intent_id,\n                topic_id=topic_id,\n                session_id=session_id,\n                summary=\"Task stuck — needs your input\",\n                data={\n },\n                urgency=\"high\",\n            )\n\n            # Step 1: First topic load - card appears\n            import json\n            topics_first_load = await store.get_active_topics(session_id)\n            assert len(topics_first_load) >= 1\n\n            results_first_load = await store.get_results_for_intent(intent_id)\n            assert len(results_first_load) == 1\n            assert json.loads(results_first_load[0][\"data\"])[\"bead_id\"] == bead_ref\n\n            # Step 2: User dismisses the card\n            deletion_result = await store.delete_result(result_id, session_id)\n            assert deletion_result[\"result_deleted\"] == 1\n\n            # Step 3: Topic reload (simulating page refresh) - card should be gone\n            topics_second_load = await store.get_active_topics(session_id)\n            assert len(topics_second_load) >= 1\n\n            results_second_load = await store.get_results_for_intent(intent_id)\n            assert len(results_second_load) == 0, \"Dismissed card should not appear on reload\"\n\n            # Step 4: Topic still exists, just the card is gone\n            topic_still_exists = next((t for t in topics_second_load if t[\"id\"] == topic_id), None)\n            assert topic_still_exists is not None\n\n        finally:\n            await store.close()\n\n    async def test_dismissal_state_survives_database_reopen(self, tmp_path):\n        \"\"\"Dismissal state persists even after completely closing and reopening the database.\"\"\"\n =============================================================================\n# Card Verification Helpers\n# =============================================================================\n\ndef verify_card_present(cards: list[dict[str, Any]], card_type: str, bead_id: str | None = None) -> bool:\n    \"\"\"\n    Verify that a card is present in the cards list.\n\n    Args:\n        cards: List of card dicts from GET /api/v1/sessions/{id}/topics\n        card_type: Type of card ('stuck' or 'failed')\n        bead_id: Optional bead_id to match\n\n    Returns:\n        True if card is present, False otherwise\n\n    Example:\n        cards = await store.get_active_topics(session_id)\n        assert verify_card_present(cards, 'stuck', 'adc-stuck-1')\n    \"\"\"\n    for card in cards:\n        # Check if this is a builtin card of the right type\n        if card.get(\"card_type\") == \"builtin\":\n            builtin_data = card.get(\"builtin_data\", {})\n            if builtin_data.get(\"type\") == card_type:\n                if bead_id is None or builtin_data.get(\"data\", {}).get(\"bead_id\") == bead_id:\n                    return True\n    return False\n\n\ndef =============================================================================\n\nasync def verify_result_exists_in_db(\n    store: SessionStore,\n    result_id: str\n) -> bool:\n    \"\"\"\n    Verify that a result exists in the database by result ID.\n\n    Args:\n        store: SessionStore instance\n        result_id: Result ID to check\n\n    Returns:\n        True if result exists, False otherwise\n\n    Example:\n        exists = await verify_result_exists_in_db(store, result_id)\n    \"\"\"\n    import sqlite3\n    try:\n        async with aiosqlite.connect(store.db_path) as db:\n            db.row_factory = aiosqlite.Row\n            async with db.execute(\n                \"SELECT 1 FROM results WHERE id = ?\",\n                (result_id,)\n            ) as cursor:\n                row = await cursor.fetchone()\n                return row is not None\n    except Exception:\n        return False\n\n\nasync def verify_result_count_for_intent(\n    store: SessionStore,\n verify_result_count_for_intent(store, intent_id, 0)\n    \"\"\"\n    results = await store.get_results_for_intent(intent_id)\n    return len(results) == expected_count\n\n\nasync def verify_result_deleted_from_db(\n    store: SessionStore,\n    result_id: str,\n    session_id: str\n) -> dict:\n    \"\"\"\n    Verify that a result was deleted from the database.\n\n    Performs both direct database query and session isolation check.\n\n    Args:\n        store: SessionStore instance\n        result_id: Result ID that should be deleted\n        session_id: Session ID for isolation check\n\n    Returns:\n        Dict with verification results:\n        {\n            \"result_deleted\": bool,\n            \"session_isolated\": bool,\n            \"verification_passed\": bool\n        }\n\n    Example:\n        verification = await verify_result_deleted_from_db(store, result_id, session_id)\n        assert verification[\"verification_passed\"]\n    \"\"\"\n    import sqlite3\n\n    # Check if result exists in database\n    result_exists = not await verify_result_exists_in_db(store, result_id)\n\n    # Check session isolation by attempting to delete again\n    deletion_result = await store.delete_result(result_id, session_id)\n    session_isolated = deletion_result.get(\"result_deleted\", 0) == 0\n\n    return {\n        \"result_deleted\": result_exists,\n        \"session_isolated\": session_isolated,\n        \"verification_passed\": result_exists and session_isolated\n    }\n\n\nasync def get_all_results_for_session(store: SessionStore, session_id: str) -> list[dict]:\n    \"\"\"\n    Get all results for a session directly from database.\n\n    Args:\n        store: SessionStore instance\n        session_id: Session ID\n\n    Returns:\n        List of result dicts\n\n    Example:\n        results = await get_all_results_for_session(store, session_id)\n    \"\"\"\n    async with aiosqlite.connect(store.db_path) as db:\n        db.row_factory = aiosqlite.Row\n        async with db.execute(\n            \"\"\"SELECT * FROM results\n               WHERE session_id = ?\n               ORDER BY created_at DESC\"\"\",\n            (session_id,)\n        ) as cursor:\n            rows = await cursor.fetchall()\n            return [dict(row) for row in rows]\n\n\nasync def verify_database_integrity_after_dismissal(\n    store: SessionStore,\n    session_id: str,\n    expected_result_count: int | None = None\n) -> dict:\n    \"\"\"\n    Verify database integrity after card dismissal.\n\n    Checks that:\n    - No orphaned results exist\n    - Result counts are consistent\n    - Foreign key relationships are intact\n\n    Args:\n        store: SessionStore instance\n        session_id: Session ID to verify\n        expected_result_count: Optional expected count of results\n\n    Returns:\n        Dict with integrity check results\n\n    Example:\n        integrity = await verify_database_integrity_after_dismissal(store, session_id)\n        assert integrity[\"all_checks_passed\"]\n    \"\"\"\n    import sqlite3\n\n    checks_passed = {}\n    all_passed = True\n\n    # Check 1: No orphaned results (results without valid session/intent/topic)\n    try:\n        async with aiosqlite.connect(store.db_path) as db:\n            db.row_factory = aiosqlite.Row\n\n            # Check for results with invalid session_id\n            async with db.execute(\n                \"\"\"SELECT COUNT(*) FROM results r\n                   LEFT JOIN sessions s ON r.session_id = s.id\n                   WHERE s.id IS NULL\"\"\"\n            ) as cursor:\n                orphaned_by_session = (await cursor.fetchone())[0]\n\n            # Check for results with invalid topic_id\n            async with db.execute(\n                \"\"\"SELECT COUNT(*) FROM results r\n                   LEFT JOIN topics t ON r.topic_id = t.id\n                   WHERE t.id IS NULL\"\"\"\n            ) as cursor:\n                orphaned_by_topic = (await cursor.fetchone())[0]\n\n            checks_passed[\"no_orphaned_results\"] = (\n                orphaned_by_session == 0 and orphaned_by_topic == 0\n            )\n            if orphaned_by_session > 0 or orphaned_by_topic > 0:\n                all_passed = False\n\n    except Exception as e:\n        checks_passed[\"no_orphaned_results\"] = False\n        all_passed = False\n\n    # Check 2: Result count consistency\n    if expected_result_count is not None:\n        results = await get_all_results_for_session(store, session_id)\n        checks_passed[\"result_count_match\"] = len(results) == expected_result_count\n        if len(results) != expected_result_count:\n            all_passed = False\n    else:\n        checks_passed[\"result_count_match\"] = True\n\n    # Check 3: Session exists and is valid\n    try:\n        session = await store.get_session(session_id)\n        checks_passed[\"session_valid\"] = session is not None\n        if session is None:\n            all_passed = False\n    except Exception:\n        checks_passed[\"session_valid\"] = False\n        all_passed = False\n\n    # Check 4: Topics are valid\n    try:\n        topics = await store.get_active_topics(session_id)\n        checks_passed[\"topics_valid\"] = all(t.get(\"id\") for t in topics)\n        if not all(t.get(\"id\") for t in topics):\n            all_passed = False\n    except Exception:\n        checks_passed[\"topics_valid\"] = False\n        all_passed = False\n\n    return {\n        \"all_checks_passed\": all_passed,\n        \"checks\": checks_passed,\n        \"details\": {\n            \"orphaned_by_session\": orphaned_by_session if 'orphaned_by_session' in locals() else 0,\n            \"orphaned_by_topic\": orphaned_by_topic if 'orphaned_by_topic' in locals() else 0,\n        }\n    }\n\n\nasync def verify_dismissal_persistence_across_reopen(\n    db_path: Path,\n    session_id: str,\n    result_id: str | None = None,\n    intent_id: str | None = None\n) -> dict:\n    \"\"\"\n    Verify that dismissal persists across database reopen.\n\n    Closes the current database and reopens it to simulate a restart.\n\n    Args:\n        db_path: Path to the database file\n        session_id: Session ID to verify\n        result_id: Optional result ID that should be deleted\n        intent_id: Optional intent ID to check results for\n\n    Returns:\n        Dict with persistence verification results\n\n    Example:\n        persistence = await verify_dismissal_persistence_across_reopen(\n            db_path, session_id, result_id=result_id\n        )\n        assert persistence[\"dismissal_persisted\"]\n    \"\"\"\n    from src.session.store import SessionStore\n\n    # Close any existing connections and reopen database\n    store1 = SessionStore(db_path)\n    await store1.initialize()\n\n    verification_results = {}\n\n    try:\n        # Verify session still exists\n        session = await store1.get_session(session_id)\n        verification_results[\"session_exists\"] = session is not None\n\n        # Verify result deletion if result_id provided\n        if result_id:\n            result_exists = await verify_result_exists_in_db(store1, result_id)\n            verification_results[\"result_deleted\"] = not result_exists\n        else:\n            verification_results[\"result_deleted\"] = True\n\n        # Verify intent results if intent_id provided\n        if intent_id:\n            results = await store1.get_results_for_intent(intent_id)\n            verification_results[\"intent_result_count\"] = len(results)\n        else:\n            verification_results[\"intent_result_count\"] = None\n\n        # Check overall persistence\n        verification_results[\"dismissal_persisted\"] = all([\n            verification_results.get(\"session_exists\", False),\n            verification_results.get(\"result_deleted\", True),\n        ])\n\n    finally:\n        await store1.close()\n\n    return verification_results\n\n\nasync def count_results_by_bead_id(\n    store: SessionStore,\n    session_id: str,\n    bead_id: str\n) -> int:\n    \"\"\"\n    Count results for a specific bead_id in a session.\n\n    Args:\n        store: SessionStore instance\n        session_id: Session ID\n        bead_id: Bead ID to count\n\n    Returns:\n        Number of results for the bead_id\n\n    Example:\n        count = await count_results_by_bead_id(store, session_id, \"adc-stuck-1\")\n    \"\"\"\n    import json\n\n    results = await get_all_results_for_session(store, session_id)\n    count = 0\n    for result in results:\n        try:\n            data = json.loads(result.get(\"data\", \"{}\"))\n            if data.get(\"bead_id\") == bead_id or data.get(\"bead_ref\") == bead_id:\n                count += 1\n        except (json.JSONDecodeError, TypeError):\n            continue\n    return count\n\n\nasync def verify_cards_remain_after_dismissal(\n    store: SessionStore,\n    session_id: str,\n    dismissed_bead_ids: list[str],\n    remaining_bead_ids: list[str]\n) -> dict:\n    \"\"\"\n    Verify that specific cards were dismissed and others remain.\n\n    Args:\n        store: SessionStore instance\n        session_id: Session ID\n        dismissed_bead_ids: Bead IDs that should be dismissed\n        remaining_bead_ids: Bead IDs that should 0\n\n    # Check remaining cards still exist\n    for bead_id in remaining_bead_ids:\n        count = await count_results_by_bead_id(store, session_id, bead_id)\n        results[f\"remaining_{bead_id}\"] = count > 0\n\n    results[\"all_correct\"] = all(results.values())\n\n    return results\n\n\n# =============================================================================\n# Dismissal Trigger Helpers\n# =============================================================================\n\ndef get_dismissal_selector(bead_id: str | None = None, card_type: str = \"stuck\") -> str:\n    \"\"\"\n    Get CSS selector for dismissal button.\n\n    Args:\n        bead_id: Optional bead_id for specific card\n        card_type: Type of card ('stuck' or 'failed')\n\n    Returns:\n        CSS selector string\n\n    Examples:\n        # Select all stuck card dismissal buttons\n        selector = get_dismissal_selector(card_type='stuck')\n\n        # Select specific card's dismissal button\n        selector = get_dismissal_selector(bead_id='adc-stuck-1', card_type='stuck')\n    \"\"\"\n    if bead_id:\n        # Specific card dismissal button\n        return f'[data-builtin=\"{card_type}\"][data-bead-id=\"{bead_id}\"] .dismiss-button'\n    else:\n        # All cards of this type\n        return f'[data-builtin=\"{card_type}\"] .dismiss-button'\n\n\nasync def trigger_dismissal(\n    page,\n    bead_id: str | None = None,\n    card_type: str = \"stuck\",\n    button_selector: str | None = None\n) -> None:\n    \"\"\"\n    Trigger a dismissal button click in the browser.\n\n    Args:\n        page: Playwright Page instance\n        bead_id: Optional bead_id for specific card\n        card_type: Type of card ('stuck' or 'failed')\n        button_selector: Optional custom button selector\n\n    Example:\n        await trigger_dismissal(page, bead_id='adc-stuck-1', card_type='stuck')\n    \"\"\"\n    if button_selector is None:\n        button_selector = get_dismissal_selector(bead_id, card_type)\n\n    # Wait for button to be present\n    await page.wait_for_selector(button_selector, timeout=5000)\n\n    # Click the button\n    await page.click(button_selector)\n\n\nasync def dismiss_and_verify(\n    page,\n    store: SessionStore,\n    session_id: str,\n    bead_id: str,\n    card_type: str = \"stuck\"\n) -> None:\n    \"\"\"\n    Dismiss a card and verify it's removed from the store.\n\n    Args:\n        page: Playwright Page instance\n        store: SessionStore instance\n        session_id: Session ID\n        bead_id: Bead ID to dismiss\n        card_type: Type of card ('stuck' or 'failed')\n\n    Example:\n        await dismiss_and_verify(page, store, session_id, 'adc-stuck-1', 'stuck')\n    \"\"\"\n    # Get cards before dismissal\n    topics_before = await store.get_active_topics(session_id)\n    cards_before = [t for t in topics_before if t.get(\"card_type\") == \"builtin\"]\n\n    # Trigger dismissal\n    await trigger_dismissal(page, bead_id=bead_id, card_type=card_type)\n\n    # Wait for removal (with timeout)\n    import asyncio\n    await asyncio.sleep(0.5)\n\n    # Get cards after dismissal\n    topics_after = await store.get_active_topics(session_id)\n    cards_after = [t for t in topics_after if t.get(\"card_type\") == \"builtin\"]\n\n    # Verify card was removed\n    card_before = find_card_by_bead_id(cards_before, bead_id)\n    card_after = find_card_by_bead_id(cards_after, bead_id)\n\n    assert card_before is not None, f\"Card {bead_id} not found before dismissal\"\n    assert card_after is None, f\"Card {bead_id} still present after dismissal\"\n\n\n# Create a stuck card with result\n            card_data = await create_stuck_card(store, session_id)\n\n            # Create the actual result\n            result_id = await store.create_result(\n                intent_id=card_data[\"intent_id\"],\n                topic_id=card_data[\"topic_id\"],\n                session_id=session_id,\n                summary=\"Test stuck card\",\n                data={\n                    \"bead_id\": card_data[\"bead_id\"],\n                    \"stuck_reason\": card_data[\"stuck_reason\"],\n                    \"refusal_count\": card_data[\"refusal_count\"],\n                    \"message\": card_data[\"message\"],\n                },\n                urgency=\"high\",\n            )\n\n            # Verify result exists\n            exists = await verify_result_exists_in_db(store, result_id)\n            assert exists is True, \"Result should exist in database\"\n\n        finally:\n            await store.close()\n\n    async def test_returns_false_for_deleted_result(self, tmp_path):\n        \"\"\"Helper returns False for deleted result.\"\"\"\n        store, session_id = await create_test_session(tmp_path=tmp_path)\n\n        try:\n            # Create and store result\n            card_data = await create_stuck_card(store, session_id)\n            result_id = await store.create_result(\n                intent_id=card_data[\"intent_id\"],\n                topic_id=card_data[\"topic_id\"],\n                session_id=session_id,\n                summary=\"Test result\",\n                data={\"bead_id\": card_data[\"bead_id\"]},\n                urgency=\"high\",\n            )\n\n            # Delete the result\n            await store.delete_result(result_id, session_id)\n\n            # Verify result no longer exists\n            exists = await verify_result_exists_in_db(store, result_id)\n            assert exists is False, \"Deleted result should not exist\"\n\n        finally:\n            await store.close()\n\n\n# =============================================================================\n# Result Count Verification Tests\n# =============================================================================\n\n@pytest.mark.asyncio\nclass TestVerifyResultCountForIntent:\n    \"\"\"Test verify_result_count_for_intent helper.\"\"\"\n\n    async def test_verifies_correct_count(self, tmp_path):\n        \"\"\"Helper correctly counts results for an intent.\"\"\"\n        store, session_id, topic_id = await create_test_session_with_topic(\n            tmp_path=tmp_path\n        )\n\n        try:\n            # Create intent\n            card_data = await create_stuck_card(\n                store, session_id, topic_id=topic_id\n            )\n\n            # Create multiple results\n            await store.create_result(\n                intent_id=card_data[\"intent_id\"],\n                topic_id=topic_id,\n                session_id=session_id,\n                summary=\"Result 1\",\n                data={\"bead_id\": card_data[\"bead_id\"]},\n                urgency=\"high\",\n            )\n            await store.create_result(\n                intent_id=card_data[\"intent_id\"],\n                topic_id=topic_id,\n                session_id=session_id,\n                summary=\"Result 2\",\n                data={\"bead_id\": card_data[\"bead_id\"]},\n                urgency=\"high\",\n            )\n\n            # Verify count\n            assert await verify_result_count_for_intent(\n                store, card_data[\"intent_id\"], 2\n            ), \"Should count 2 results\"\n\n            # Delete one and verify new count\n            results = await store.get_results_for_intent(card_data[\"intent_id\"])\n            await store.delete_result(results[0][\"id\"], session_id)\n\n            assert await verify_result_count_for_intent(\n                store, card_data[\"intent_id\"], 1\n            ), \"Should count 1 result after deletion\"\n\n        finally:\n            await store.close()\n\n\n# =============================================================================\n# Result Deletion Verification Tests\n# =============================================================================\n\n@pytest.mark.asyncio\nclass TestVerifyResultDeletedFromDb:\n    \"\"\"Test verify_result_deleted_from_db helper.\"\"\"\n\n    async def test_verifies_successful_deletion(self, tmp_path):\n        \"\"\"Helper verifies result was deleted with session isolation.\"\"\"\n        store, session_id, topic_id = await create_test_session_with_topic(\n            tmp_path=tmp_path\n        )\n\n        try:\n            card_data = await create_stuck_card(\n                store, session_id, topic_id=topic_id\n            )\n\n            result_id = await store.create_result(\n                intent_id=card_data[\"intent_id\"],\n                topic_id=topic_id,\n                session_id=session_id,\n                summary=\"Test result\",\n                data={\"bead_id\": card_data[\"bead_id\"]},\n                urgency=\"high\",\n            )\n\n            # Delete the result\n            await store.delete_result(result_id, session_id)\n\n            # Verify deletion\n            verification = await verify_result_deleted_from_db(\n                store, result_id, session_id\n            )\n\n            assert verification[\"result_deleted\"] is True\n            assert verification[\"session_isolated\"] is True\n            assert verification[\"verification_passed\"] is True\n\n        finally:\n            await store.close()\n\n\n# =============================================================================\n# Database Integrity Verification Tests\n# =============================================================================\n\n@pytest.mark.asyncio\nclass TestVerifyDatabaseIntegrityAfterDismissal:\n    \"\"\"Test verify_database_integrity_after_dismissal helper.\"\"\"\n\n    async def test_passes_all_checks_after_dismissal(self, tmp_path):\n        \"\"\"Helper verifies database integrity after card dismissal.\"\"\"\n        store, session_id, topic_id = await create_test_session_with_topic(\n            tmp_path=tmp_path\n        )\n\n        try:\n            # Create multiple cards\n            cards = []\n            for i in range(3):\n                card_data = await create_stuck_card(\n                    store,\n                    session_id,\n                    topic_id=topic_id,\n                    bead_id=f\"adc-stuck-{i}\",\n                )\n                result_id = await store.create_result(\n                    intent_id=card_data[\"intent_id\"],\n                    topic_id=topic_id,\n                    session_id=session_id,\n                    summary=f\"Card {i}\",\n                    data={\"bead_id\": card_data[\"bead_id\"]},\n                    urgency=\"high\",\n                )\n                cards.append(result_id)\n\n            # Dismiss one card\n            await store.delete_result(cards[1], session_id)\n\n            # Verify integrity (expect 2 results remaining)\n            integrity = await verify_database_integrity_after_dismissal(\n                store, session_id, expected_result_count=2\n            )\n\n            assert integrity[\"all_checks_passed\"] is True\n            assert integrity[\"checks\"][\"no_orphaned_results\"] is True\n            assert integrity[\"checks\"][\"result_count_match\"] is True\n            assert integrity[\"checks\"][\"session_valid\"] is True\n            assert integrity[\"checks\"][\"topics_valid\"] is True\n\n        finally:\n            await store.close()\n\n\n# =============================================================================\n# Dismissal Persistence Across Reopen Tests\n# =============================================================================\n\n@pytest.mark.asyncio\nclass TestVerifyDismissalPersistenceAcrossReopen:\n    \"\"\"Test verify_dismissal_persistence_across_reopen helper.\"\"\"\n\n    async def test_verifies_dismissal_persists_across_db_reopen(self, tmp_path):\n        \"\"\"Helper verifies dismissal state survives database reopen.\"\"\"\n        db_path = tmp_path / \"test_persistence.db\"\n\n        # Create session and card\n        store1 = SessionStore(db_path)\n        await store1.initialize()\n\n        session_id = await store1.create_session()\n        topic_id, _ = await store1.find_or_create_topic(\n            label=\"Persistence Test\",\n            session_id=session_id,\n            topic_type=\"project\",\n        )\n\n        card_data = await create_stuck_card(\n            store1, session_id, topic_id=topic_id, bead_id=\"adc-persist-test\"\n        )\n\n        result_id = await store1.create_result(\n            intent_id=card_data[\"intent_id\"],\n            topic_id=topic_id,\n            session_id=session_id,\n            summary=\"Test card\",\n            data={\"bead_id\": card_data[\"bead_id\"]},\n            urgency=\"high\",\n        )\n\n        # Dismiss the card\n        await store1.delete_result(result_id, session_id)\n        await store1.close()\n\n        # Verify dismissal persists across reopen\n        persistence = await verify_dismissal_persistence_across_reopen(\n            db_path, session_id, result_id=result_id, intent_id=card_data[\"intent_id\"]\n        )\n\n        assert persistence[\"session_exists\"] is True\n        assert persistence[\"result_deleted\"] is True\n        assert persistence[\"intent_result_count\"] == 0\n        assert persistence[\"dismissal_persisted\"] is True\n\n\n# =============================================================================\n# Count Results by Bead ID Tests\n# =============================================================================\n\n@pytest.mark.asyncio\nclass TestCountResultsByBeadId:\n    \"\"\"Test count_results_by_bead_id helper.\"\"\"\n\n    async def test_counts_results_for_specific_bead(self, tmp_path):\n        \"\"\"Helper counts results for a specific bead_id.\"\"\"\n        store, session_id, topic_id = await create_test_session_with_topic(\n            tmp_path=tmp_path\n        )\n\n        try:\n            # Create cards for different beads\n            bead_1_id = \"adc-stuck-1\"\n            bead_2_id = \"adc-stuck-2\"\n\n            card_1 = await create_stuck_card(\n                store, session_id, topic_id=topic_id, bead_id=bead_1_id\n            )\n            card_2 = await create_stuck_card(\n                store, session_id, topic_id=topic_id, bead_id=bead_2_id\n            )\n\n            # Create 2 results for bead_1, 1 result for bead_2\n            await store.create_result(\n                intent_id=card_1[\"intent_id\"],\n                topic_id=topic_id,\n                session_id=session_id,\n                summary=\"Card 1a\",\n                data={\"bead_id\": bead_1_id},\n                urgency=\"high\",\n            )\n            await store.create_result(\n                intent_id=card_1[\"intent_id\"],\n                topic_id=topic_id,\n                session_id=session_id,\n                summary=\"Card 1b\",\n                data={\"bead_id\": bead_1_id},\n                urgency=\"high\",\n            )\n            await store.create_result(\n                intent_id=card_2[\"intent_id\"],\n                topic_id=topic_id,\n                session_id=session_id,\n                summary=\"Card 2\",\n                data={\"bead_id\": bead_2_id},\n                urgency=\"high\",\n            )\n\n            # Step 1: Create stuck card\n            card_data = await create_stuck_card(\n                store, session_id, topic_id=topic_id, bead_id=\"adc-e2e-test\"\n            )\n            result_id = await store.create_result(\n                intent_id=card_data[\"intent_id\"],\n                topic_id=topic_id,\n                session_id=session_id,\n                summary=\"E2E test card\",\n                data={\n                    \"bead_id\": card_data[\"bead_id\"],\n                    \"stuck_reason\": \"E2E test\",\n                    \"refusal_count\": 1,\n                    \"message\": \"Test card\",\n                },\n                urgency=\"high\",\n            )\n\n            # Verify result exists\n            assert await verify_result_exists_in_db(store, result_id)\n            assert await verify_result_count_for_intent(\n                store, card_data[\"intent_id\"], 1\n            )\n\n            # Step 2: Dismiss the card\n            deletion_result = await store.delete_result(result_id, session_id)\n            assert deletion_result[\"result_deleted\"] == 1\n\n            # Step 3: Verify deletion\n            deletion_verification = await verify_result_deleted_from_db(\n                store, result_id, session_id\n            )\n            assert deletion_verification[\"verification_passed\"] is True\n\n            # Step 4: Verify no orphaned data\n            integrity = await verify_database_integrity_after_dismissal(\n                store, session_id, expected_result_count=0\n            )\n            assert integrity[\"all_checks_passed\"] is True\n\n        finally:\n            await store.close()\n\n    async def test_multiple_cards_dismissal_with_verification(self, tmp_path):\n        \"\"\"Test dismissing multiple cards with comprehensive verification.\"\"\"\n        store, session_id, topic_id = await create_test_session_with_topic(\n            tmp_path=tmp_path, label=\"Multi-Card DB Verification\"\n        )\n\n        try:\n            # Create 5 cards\n            bead_ids = [f\"adc-multi-{i}\" for i in range(5)]\n            card_data_list = []\n\n            for bead_id in bead_ids:\n                card_data = await create_stuck_card(\n                    store, session_id, topic_id=topic_id, bead_id=bead_id\n                )\n                await store.create_result(\n                    intent_id=card_data[\"intent_id\"],\n                    topic_id=topic_id,\n                    session_id=session_id,\n                    summary=f\"Multi card {bead_id}\",\n                    data={\"bead_id\": bead_id},\n                    urgency=\"high\",\n                )\n                card_data_list.append(card_data)\n\n            # Verify all 5 exist\n            for card_data in card_data_list:\n                assert await verify_result_count_for_intent(\n                    store, card_data[\"intent_id\"], 1\n                )\n\n            # Dismiss cards 1, 3, and 5\n            to_dismiss = [0, 2, 4]\n            dismissed_ids = []\n            for idx in to_dismiss:\n                results = await store.get_results_for_intent(\n                    card_data_list[idx][\"intent_id\"]\n                )\n                await store.delete_result(results[0][\"id\"], session_id)\n                dismissed_ids.append(bead_ids[idx])\n\n            # Verify selective dismissal\n            remaining_ids = [bid for i, bid in enumerate(bead_ids) if i not in to_dismiss]\n            verification = await verify_cards_remain_after_dismissal(\n                store, session_id, dismissed_bead_ids=dismissed_ids, remaining_bead_ids=remaining_ids\n            )\n            assert verification[\"all_correct\"] is True\n\n            # Verify database integrity\n            integrity = await verify_database_integrity_after_dismissal(\n                store, session_id, expected_result_count=2\n            )\n            assert integrity[\"all_checks_passed\"] is True\n\n        finally:\n
